title: ouratea elongata
intro: Ouratea elongata, also known as the Elongated Ouratea, is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and improving digestion. Ouratea elongata is typically prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and may also be used in combination with other plants to create medicinal remedies.
